message:
docs: ft branding sweep in research + prompt docs

Replaces remaining "wa" / "wezterm_automata" references with "ft" /
"FrankenTerm" in two more tracked documents:

- RESEARCH_FINDINGS.md: title, binary name, goal description
- wezterm_automata_prompt_je.md: hook deprecation note

No behavioral changes — text-only fixes.
